# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: cicd-docker-build
  labels:
    app: cicd-docker-build
spec:
  restartPolicy: Never
  serviceAccountName: cicd-build-sa
  securityContext:
    fsGroup: 1000
  containers:
    - name: builder
      image: docker:27-cli
      imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
      command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep infinity"]
      securityContext:
        privileged: true
        runAsUser: 0
        runAsGroup: 0
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
        capabilities:
          add:
            - ALL
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-sock
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
        - name: build-workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
  volumes:
    - name: docker-sock
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
        type: Socket
    - name: build-workspace
      emptyDir: {}
